titleStmt.title: SII 25.128: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 128. (A.R. No. 128 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the first prākāra in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

The details of the date of the inscription viz., year 22, Ṛishabha 4, śu 2, Rōhiṇi-nakshatra may be equated with 1275 A.D., April 29, Monday. But the nakshatra ended on the previous day. The other equivalent is Sunday, the 3rd May, 1318 A.D., taking the 4th Solar day as 8th day. (Ep. Ind., Vol. XI, pp. 137-38)

It records the sale of uḻavu-tavaṇai (right of cultivating the lands) to Poliñjuniṉṟapirāṉ Aḻagiyanambiyar alias Pallavarāyar of Muttūr alias Uyyakkoṇḍaśōḻanallūr in Muttūṟṟuk-kūṟṟam by the śrīkāriyañ-cheyvārgaḷ, the śivabrāhmaṇas who had the right of worship for a cycle of thirty days (muppadu-vaṭṭam), the tānattār of the sthāna and Abhimuttīśvaramuḍaiyāṉ of the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu.

The lands along with its income at Muḷaikkāḍu, a dēvadāṉa of Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār located below Muḷaikkāḍu-channel and to the north of Tirupputtūr were sold as uḻavu-tavaṇai, after receiving its value of 1000 rāśi-paṇam which was taken to Vilaiy-āvaṇa-kaḷam. The purchaser has to tell and give the lease amount. The tax kīḻvārappachchai which was collected before, need not be collected again for these lease lands.

The sale document thus executed was attested by Perumāḷ-pādaṉ, Sēṉaiperumāḷ-nambi, Avimuttīśvaram-uḍaiyāṉ, Nityasundara-bhaṭṭaṉ, Atarvēdibhaṭṭaṉ, Āṇḍapiḷḷaiyār, Tillaiyāḷi-bhaṭṭaṉ, Maḻavarāya-bhaṭṭaṉ, Tirunāgīśvaramuḍaiyāṉ Āṇḍapiḷḷaiyār, Āṇḍapiḷḷai-nambiyār, Sundara-Pāṇḍya-bhaṭṭaṉ, Tribhuvanasundara-bhaṭṭaṉ, Śivaṉ-bhaṭṭaṉ, Śaivarāśa-bhaṭṭaṉ, Māṟgaviśai-Tirundapiḷḷai, Śaḍaikoṇḍa-vayirāgi, Tiruvīdippiḷḷai, and Ālāla-sundaravayirāgi. This was drafted by the temple accountant Āṇḍapiḷḷai.

Since the signatories viz., Perumāḷ-pādaṉ and Nityasundara-bhaṭṭaṉ in this record and in a record of Māṟavarmaṉ Kulaśēkhara dated 1304 A.D., (Vide No. 133 of 1908) seem to be identical, it may be surmised that Māṟavarmaṉ Kulaśēkhara and Jaṭāvarmaṉ Vīra Pāṇḍya of the above two inscriptions are not far removed from each other in point of time. On account of the proximity of dates and the mention of signatories, the king of our record may be identified with Jaṭāvarmaṉ Vīra Pāṇḍya of accession 1297 A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī koccaṭai paṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī virapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2vatu Iṣapanāyaṟṟu 4 10 2 yum pūrvvapakṣattu dutiyaiyum peṟṟa rohiṇi nāḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyantirupputtūr Uṭaiyār tiruttaḷi yāṇṭa
nāyaṉār koyil śrī kāriyañceyvārkaḷum Apimuttiśvara muṭaiyāṉum muppatu vaṭṭattu śivabrāhmaṇarum tāṉattuk kamainta tāṉattārum Ivvaṉaivomum muttāṟṟuk kūṟṟattu muttūṟāṉa Uyyakkoṇṭa coḻa nallūr poli
ñcu niṉṟa pirāṉ Aḻakiyanampiāṉa pallavarāyaṟkku Uḻavu tavaṇai vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvūr vaṭavāy vayalmuṉaik kāṭṭuvāykkālk kiḻmaḻaik kaṇṇiśvarakarattu Uṭaiyār
tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyaṉār tevatāṉa muḷaikkāṭṭuvayal nāṉkellai Uḷppaṭṭa palataṭikaḷ muṟṟum Uḻavutavaṇai vilaiyāka viṟpāṉicaintu viṟpataṟku perunāṉkellaiyāvatu . kiḻellai Innāyaṉār tevatāṉam tiru
p pāṟkaṭal vayakkalukku melaivāykkālukkum ṭikkaraṇayem paltaṭiyiraṇṭukkum cekaṇṭ vayakkal taṭi Iraṇṭukkum Itaṉ teṉ meṉmulai muṟkattuṭavalukkum meṟkum teṉṉellai pāṇṭaṅkālivā
ykkālukku vaṭakkum melellai peruvaḻikkum vaṭakku nokkip poṉamuḷaikkāṭṭuvāykkālukkum kiḻakkum vaṭavellai yivvāykkālukku teṟkum Āka vicainta peru nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilamuṟṟum
Innilaṅkaḷil niṟkiṟamākkaḷ maraṅkaḷ muṟṟum Innilattāl vanta niropātiyum Ivvayalukku kuṭiyiruppāṉa kaṭikkāc cey meṟtalaivāykkālukku melaik kuṭiyiruppukkum kaḷattukkum paḻavellaiye yellaiyāvatākavu
m Āka Ippecappaṭṭavai Aṉaittum meṉokkiya maramum tiṉokkiya kiṇarum maṟṟum In nilattāl vanta Eppeṟppaṭṭa samasta praptikaḷukkum Emmilicain
tu vilaiyaṟa ceytta I 1000 Ippaṇam Āyiramum vilaiyāvaṇakaḷatte kāṭṭi yeṟṟikkaic celavaṟak koṇṭu vilaikkuṟu viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom polintu niṉṟa pirāṉa
Aḻakiya nampiyārāṉa pallavarāyaṟku cikāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum Apimuttiśvaramuṭaiyāṉum muppatu vaṭṭattu civabrāhmaṇarum tāṉattukkamainta tāṉattārum . Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ivvayal cantirātittavaṟku Uḻutu vāram Iṭuvārā
kavum kiḻvārap paccai Ivvayalukku muṉpu Iṟuttup potāmaiyāl piṉpum kiḻvārappaccai koḷkkaṭavutalla vāvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom polintu niṉṟapirāṉ Aḻakiya kampiy(ā)ṉa
palṭavarāyaṟku cikāriyañceyvārkaḷum Abhimuttiśvavara muṭaiyāṉum muppatu vaṭṭattu civabrahmaṇarum tāṉattuk kamainta tāṉattārum Ivai perumāḷ pākar Eḻuttu § Ivai ceṉaip perumāḷ nampi Eḻuttu Ivai Avimutticcura muṭai
yāṉ Eḻuttu § Ivai nityasāntarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai § An=tarvvedipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivai nityasundara bhaṭṭaṉ Āṇṭa piḷḷaiyār Eḻuttu § Ivai tillaiyāḷi bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivai Ivai maḻavarāya paṭṭaṉ Āṇṭapiḷḷaiyār Eḻuttu §
Ivai tirunākiśvaramuṭaiyāṉ Āṇṭa piḷḷaiyār Eḻuttu § Ivai Āṇṭapiḷḷai nampiyār Eḻuttu § Ivai cuntara pāṇṭiya paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivai tribhuvaṉasun=tara bhaṭṭaṉ Āṇṭa piḷḷaiyār Eḻuttu § Ivai civaṉ bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu §
Ivai caiva rāca bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivai māṟka vicai tiruntapiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ivai caṭaikoṇṭa vayirāki Eḻuttu § Ivai tiruvitippiḷḷai Eḻuttu § Ivai Amaṇā cai yaṟutta piḷḷai Eḻuttu § Ivai Ālāla cuntara vayirāki Eḻuttu §
I pramāṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ koyil kaṇakku Āṇṭa piḷḷaiyāṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 25.128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
